patch.value: Import GitHub author + timestamps, rate-limit visibility, --skip-drafts
Additive enhancements: github_author tag + github_created_at/github_updated_at schema fields, X-RateLimit visibility in validate, and a --skip-drafts import flag

value.author: codex
value.text: Feature 1: registerItemFields now declares github_author/github_created_at/github_updated_at; import emits a github_author:<login> tag and enriches the description with author + created/updated ISO timestamps (additive). Verified on a real 106-item import of unbraind/pm-cli.

value.author: codex
value.text: Feature 2: parseRateLimit/formatRateLimit parse X-RateLimit-Remaining/Limit/Reset case-insensitively; pm github validate --repo surfaces quota + warns when low. Verified live: quota 4900/5000 reported.

value.author: codex
value.text: Feature 3: --skip-drafts excludes draft PRs (isDraftPr) when --include-prs set. Unit-tested; live import accepted the flag.

patch.value: Shipped in 2026.6.4: github_author/timestamps fields, rate-limit visibility, --skip-drafts. Built, typechecked, 23 tests pass, functionally verified.
